queries.question: For every stream, list the caption and subtitles types they use.
queries.sql: select streamings.title , captions_and_subtitles.type from Streamings_captions_and_subtitles join Captions_and_subtitles on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id = Captions_and_subtitles.caption_id join Streamings on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id = Streamings.streaming_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?type WHERE {
  ?streamings_captions_and_subtitles a :Streamings_captions_and_subtitles .
  ?captions_and_subtitles a :Captions_and_subtitles .
  ?streamings_captions_and_subtitles p:hasCaptions_and_subtitles ?captions_and_subtitles .
  ?streamings a :Streamings .
  ?streamings_captions_and_subtitles p:hasStreamings ?streamings .
  ?streamings p:title ?title .
  ?captions_and_subtitles p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Give me the caption and subtitle languages and types for every streaming.
queries.sql: SELECT Captions_and_subtitles.type, Captions_and_subtitles.language  from Streamings_captions_and_subtitles join Captions_and_subtitles on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id = Captions_and_subtitles.caption_id join Streamings on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id = Streamings.streaming_id   GROUP BY Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streamings)

queries.question: Give me the caption and subtitle languages and types for every streaming.
queries.sql: select streamings.title , captions_and_subtitles.type , captions_and_subtitles.language from Streamings_captions_and_subtitles join Captions_and_subtitles on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id = Captions_and_subtitles.caption_id join Streamings on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id = Streamings.streaming_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?type ?language WHERE {
  ?streamings_captions_and_subtitles a :Streamings_captions_and_subtitles .
  ?captions_and_subtitles a :Captions_and_subtitles .

  ?streamings a :Streamings .
  ?streamings_captions_and_subtitles p:hasStreamings ?streamings .
  ?streamings p:title ?title .
  ?captions_and_subtitles p:type ?type .
  ?captions_and_subtitles p:language ?language .
}

queries.question: Show me caption and subtitle languages each stream has.
queries.sql: SELECT Captions_and_subtitles.language  from Streamings_captions_and_subtitles join Captions_and_subtitles on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id = Captions_and_subtitles.caption_id join Streamings on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id = Streamings.streaming_id   GROUP BY Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streamings)

queries.question: Tell me what captions and subtitles types each stream uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Captions_and_subtitles.type  from Streamings_captions_and_subtitles join Captions_and_subtitles on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id = Captions_and_subtitles.caption_id join Streamings on Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id = Streamings.streaming_id   GROUP BY Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.captions_and_subtitles_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streamings_captions_and_subtitles.streamings_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streamings)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me what captions and subtitles types each stream uses.
Give me the caption and subtitle languages and types for every streaming.
Show me caption and subtitle languages each stream has.
